step_rationale: Bioactive lysophospholipid; enriched in dense LDL; immune activator.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylinositol is a pro-inflammatory lipid mediator carried in dense LDL that amplifies plaque inflammation.

references.title: LDL subclass lipidomics in atherogenic dyslipidemia: effect of statin therapy on bioactive lipids and dense LDL.
